nasb.text: You are not allowed to sacrifice the Passover in any of your towns which the Lord your God is giving you;

esv.text: You may not offer the Passover sacrifice within any of your towns that the Lord your God is giving you,

cnv.text: 你不能在耶和華你的　神賜給你的任何一座城裡，宰殺逾越節的祭牲；

ccb.text: 在你们的上帝耶和华将要赐给你们的各城中，你们不可随便献逾越节的祭牲，
